title: How to Format Prompts for Better AI Responses
description: Learn the techniques that separate mediocre AI outputs from precise, actionable ones: role assignment, clear instruction blocks, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured XML/JSON formats.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: Writing System Prompts That Actually Work
description: A practical guide to crafting system prompts that produce consistent AI behavior — covering role, context, constraints, output format, and how to test and iterate across customer support, coding, and writing use cases.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: Model Context Protocol (MCP): What It Is and How to Configure It
description: MCP is Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI models to tools, files, and databases. Learn how the client-server architecture works, which servers to use, and how to write a working MCP config for Claude Desktop and Claude Code.
author: BrowseryTools Team

title: CLAUDE.md Files: How to Give AI the Context It Needs About Your Codebase
description: A CLAUDE.md file at your project root gives Claude Code standing context about your stack, conventions, and architecture — eliminating the repeated corrections that come with a context-blind AI assistant.
author: BrowseryTools Team
